action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline worst_region_accuracy=0.4666 (Africa), overall=0.6666 after 3 epochs. ~305s/epoch. Analysis: Model underfitting, need more training. Africa far behind other regions. Decision: Train 15 more epochs from checkpoint with stronger augmentation and resume from best checkpoint.
action.command: EPOCHS=15 BS=32 LR=2e-5 RESUME=checkpoints/best.pt torchrun --nproc_per_node=4 train.py
